papers.title_en: A generative model of lung CT conditioned on radiomics features
papers.tldr: 本研究针对传统生成模型无法精确控制图像属性的问题，提出了一种基于放射组学特征约束的肺部CT图像生成模型。通过将定量的放射组学特征作为条件输入，该模型实现了对合成图像特定病理或解剖属性的精准调控。这一方法不仅提高了医学影像生成的质量和可解释性，还为医疗数据增强和个性化临床模拟提供了有效的技术手段。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning image generation has been an active area of research in a number ofapplications. However, traditional generative models are not able to control specificproperties of the image outputs. In this work, we propose a deep learning model that …

papers.title_en: Robust multiparametric model selection for semi‑supervised event‑free survival prediction in lung cancer using PET/CT radiomics
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺癌个性化治疗需求，提出了一种基于PET/CT影像组学的稳健多参数模型选择框架。通过结合机器学习与半监督学习技术，该方法旨在解决生存预测中的模型不稳定性问题，特别是在标注数据有限的情况下，实现了对肺癌患者无事件生存期（EFS）的精准预测。研究证明了稳健模型选择在提升预后评估可靠性方面的关键作用，为临床精准医疗提供了重要的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Robust model selection is essential for improved lung cancer outcome predictiontowards personalized treatments. Machine learning (ML) combined with PET/CTradiomics provides a powerful framework for predictive modeling. However …

papers.title_en: Opportunistic Diagnosis of Osteoporosis through CT Pulmonary Angiography for Suspected Pulmonary Embolism
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了利用疑似肺栓塞患者的CT肺血管造影（CTPA）影像进行骨质疏松症机会性筛查的可行性。骨质疏松症是一种普遍且诊断不足的疾病，而CTPA扫描中包含的椎体信息可用于评估骨密度。研究表明，通过对现有CTPA影像的二次利用，可以在不增加患者辐射暴露和额外成本的情况下，有效识别骨质疏松高风险人群，为该病的早期干预提供了新途径。
papers.abstract_en: Background CT pulmonary angiography (CTPA) ordered to confirm or excludepulmonary embolism (PE) often reveals incidental findings. Its yield in theopportunistic detection of osteoporosis, a prevalent, under-diagnosed condition, is …

papers.title_en: Intracranial Changes after Fetal Spina Bifida Repair by 2D and 3D Slice-to-Volume MRI Reconstruction: Implications for the Etiology of Hydrocephalus
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了开放性脊柱裂胎儿在接受产前修复手术后的颅内变化。通过应用2D和3D切片到体积（SVR）MRI重建技术，研究者详细分析了手术对脑后疝和脑室扩大的改善作用。结果表明，手术不仅保护了神经组织，还显著改变了脑脊液动力学，为揭示脊柱裂相关脑积水的病因提供了关键的影像学证据，有助于优化临床评估与治疗策略。
papers.abstract_en: BACKGROUD AND PURPOSE: Open spinal dysraphism is associated withhindbrain herniation and ventriculomegaly. Prenatal surgery improves outcomes byprotecting neural tissue and altering CSF dynamics. In our experience, fetal MRI …

papers.title_en: Knowledge-Guided and Reinforced Selective State Space Model for radiology report generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科报告生成中“黑盒”模型透明度低及奖励函数过于简单的问题，提出了一种知识引导且经过强化学习优化的选择性状态空间模型。通过整合显性医学知识，该方法旨在提升报告的临床准确性与语言质量，为医疗影像自动诊断提供了更具解释性和精确性的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Objective: To address the limitations of “black box” sequence models and simplisticreward functions in radiology report generation, we aim to improve clinical accuracyand linguistic quality by integrating explicit medical knowledge and a clinically …

papers.title_en: A robust vision language model for molecular status prediction and radiology report generation in adult-type diffuse gliomas
papers.tldr: 本研究开发了名为Glio-LLaMA-Vision的视觉语言模型，旨在解决成人型弥漫性胶质瘤的分子状态预测和放射报告生成（RRG）难题。该模型利用1001例患者的多参数MRI数据及配对报告进行训练，实现了从影像到分子诊断及自动化报告生成的跨模态理解，为胶质瘤的精准诊疗提供了高效、稳健的辅助工具。
papers.abstract_en: We aimed to establish a robust vision-language model (“Glio-LLaMA-Vision”) formolecular status prediction and radiology report generation (RRG) in adult-typediffuse gliomas. Multiparametric MRI data and paired radiology reports from 1001 …

papers.title_en: Integrated system for characterization of malignant and benign adrenal lesions and differentiation of high‑and low‑risk adrenal cancer on CT scans using radiomics …
papers.tldr: 针对肾上腺癌预后差、诊断难的现状，本研究利用CT影像组学技术开发了一套集成化诊断系统。该系统不仅能有效区分肾上腺良恶性病变，还能对肾上腺癌进行高低风险分层。作为一种无创的辅助工具，该研究为肾上腺肿瘤的精准医疗提供了新方案，有助于提高患者的生存评估和治疗决策水平。
papers.abstract_en: Adrenal cancer is a rare but deadly disease, with a 5-year survival rate of only 10-20% at advanced stages. Our hospital is a national center specialized in thetreatment and research of adrenal cancer. We propose a radiomics-based integrated …

papers.title_en: Multiple Point MedSAM Prompting for Enhanced Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学图像分割任务，提出了一种基于多点提示（Multiple Point Prompting）的MedSAM增强方法。针对单点提示在复杂解剖结构中表现不佳的局限性，该方法通过引入多个空间约束点来引导模型，显著提升了MedSAM在多种医学影像模态下的分割精度和鲁棒性，为医疗基础模型的临床应用优化提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Automatic and accurate medical image segmentation remains a fundamental task incomputer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning. Recent advances in foundationmodels, such as the medical-focused Segment Anything Model (MedSAM), have …

papers.title_en: BM1. 0: a radiomics computational dictionary bridging AI research and clinical practice in breast cancer care
papers.tldr: 本研究针对乳腺癌诊断中AI模型及影像组学特征（RFs）存在的“黑盒”问题，开发了BM1.0影像组学计算字典。该工具旨在将复杂的数学图像特征与临床实践联系起来，通过建立标准化的计算框架，提升AI研究在乳腺癌临床应用中的可解释性与信任度，为弥合AI技术与临床决策之间的鸿沟提供了重要支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Artificial intelligence (AI) models for breast cancer diagnostics show great promise,but their “black box” nature limits clinical trust and adoption. This is especially true forradiomics features (RFs), mathematically derived from images yet disconnected from …

papers.title_en: Delta radiomics from multiparametric MRI predicts survival and treatment response in post‑treatment glioma patients
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胶质瘤患者治疗后预后评估的临床难题，提出了一种基于多参数MRI的Delta影像组学分析方法。通过提取治疗前后影像特征的动态变化（Delta特征），研究构建了预测生存期和治疗反应的模型。结果表明，该非侵入性方法能有效捕捉肿瘤的时空异质性，为胶质瘤患者的精准预后评估和个体化治疗决策提供了重要的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate prognostication in glioma and brain cancer patients remains a criticalchallenge, particularly in the posttreatment setting. Radiomics is a field of study thatextracts high dimensional features from medical imaging, and it offers a non-invasive …

papers.title_en: FusionDRR: dual-pathway feature fusion for end-to-end differentiable digitally reconstructed radiograph generation
papers.tldr: FusionDRR 是一种新型端到端可微数字化重建放射影像（DRR）生成框架。针对传统方法在几何精度、计算效率与可微性之间难以兼顾的问题，该研究提出了一种双路径特征融合策略。该方法不仅提升了 DRR 合成的质量和效率，还通过端到端的可微性，为手术导航和深度学习驱动的医学图像分析提供了更强大的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Digitally reconstructed radiographs (DRRs) are essential for applications rangingfrom surgical navigation to deep learning-based medical image analysis. However,conventional DRR generation methods face persistent trade-offs between geometric …

papers.title_en: Joint training to improve report generation capability from longitudinal CT volumes with a vision‑language model
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了如何通过不同的训练策略提升视觉语言模型（VLM）在纵向CT影像中自动生成日语放射科报告的能力。研究重点分析了联合训练策略对处理多时期CT数据的影响，旨在解决自动报告生成中的准确性问题，为临床影像诊断提供更高效的自动化支持。
papers.abstract_en: This study is to investigate how different training strategies affect the performance ofa VLM for the task of automatic Japanese radiology report generation fromComputed Tomography (CT) volumes. Automatically generating radiology reports …

papers.title_en: Automatic Configuration of LLM Post-Training Pipelines
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）后训练过程中监督微调（SFT）与强化学习（RL）阶段配置困难的问题，提出了一种自动化配置框架。由于后训练流水线具有高维异构且阶段强耦合的特点，在现实计算预算下手动调优极具挑战。该方法通过系统化搜索优化配置，显著提升了模型性能，为高效构建高质量LLM提供了自动化解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: LLM post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning and reinforcementlearning are difficult to configure under realistic compute budgets: the configurationspace is high-dimensional and heterogeneous, stages are strongly coupled, and …

papers.title_en: LoopRPT: Reinforcement Pre-Training for Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对循环语言模型（LoopLMs）提出了 LoopRPT 强化预训练框架。LoopLMs 通过内部迭代计算来精炼表征，是显式思维链（CoT）的潜在替代方案。针对现有强化学习范式在优化此类模型内部逻辑方面的不足，LoopRPT 在预训练阶段引入强化学习，引导模型在潜空间内进行更有效的迭代推理。实验表明，该方法显著增强了模型的隐式推理能力，为开发无需冗长输出即可解决复杂问题的模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Looped language models (LoopLMs) perform iterative latent computation to refineinternal representations, offering a promising alternative to explicit chain-of-thought(CoT) reasoning. However, existing reinforcement learning (RL) paradigms primarily …

papers.title_en: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
papers.tldr: 针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中视觉标记减少导致的性能瓶颈，本文提出了 VISOR。该方法通过稀疏且动态选择的视觉-语言交互，在不损失关键信息的前提下提升了模型效率。VISOR 允许模型根据需求动态访问视觉特征，从而在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算开销，为高效多模态学习提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach,however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对深度神经语言模型中语言表示学习难以追踪的长期挑战，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪器。该方法旨在解决在复杂模型中定位特定语言表示的难题，通过引入对抗性扰动机制来探测模型内部的特征编码。研究的主要贡献在于提供了一种低成本、高效率的分析工具，为理解和评估语言模型的内部表示学习提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在图形用户界面（GUI）定位任务中，利用离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLM）替代传统的自回归（AR）模型。针对GUI Agent在理解和定位界面元素时的挑战，作者提出了一种基于扩散模型的新框架。该方法通过离散扩散过程提升了模型对复杂界面布局的感知能力，在多个GUI定位基准测试中展现出优于或等同于主流AR模型的性能，为开发高效GUI智能体提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominatedmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding.Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在监督微调（SFT）过程中，感知能力提升却导致推理性能下降的“推理税”问题，提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度处理，旨在微调过程中平衡感知与推理能力。实验证明，该方法能有效缓解推理性能的退化，为优化VLM的后训练过程提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在辅助科研构思时难以自动评估提案质量（如创新性和合理性）的问题，提出了一种学习预测与未来趋势对齐的科研提案的方法。该方法通过利用LLM预测未来研究方向，解决了大规模人工评估的局限性。研究证明，这种基于未来对齐的预测模型能更有效地衡量提案价值，为自动化科研评估和辅助决策提供了重要工具。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …

papers.title_en: Task-Centric Personalized Federated Fine-Tuning of Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对联邦学习在处理异构任务语言模型微调时出现的性能下降问题，提出了一种以任务为中心的个性化联邦微调框架。该方法通过识别和聚合相似任务的知识，有效缓解了模型聚合带来的负面干扰，在保护隐私的同时提升了分布式异构任务上的模型表现。
papers.abstract_en: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising technique for traininglanguage models on distributed and private datasets of diverse tasks. However,aggregating models trained on heterogeneous tasks often degrades the overall …

papers.title_en: A Reasoning-Enabled Vision-Language Foundation Model for Chest X-ray Interpretation
papers.tldr: 针对放射科医生面临的高强度胸部X光片（CXR）解读压力及误诊风险，本研究开发了一种具备推理能力的视觉-语言基础模型。该模型通过整合大规模医学影像与文本数据，实现了对CXR的深度理解与逻辑推理。实验表明，该模型在自动生成诊断报告和辅助临床决策方面表现优异，为缓解医疗资源紧张、提升诊断准确性提供了创新的AI解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-rays (CXRs) are among the most frequently performed imagingexaminations worldwide, yet rising imaging volumes increase radiologist workloadand the risk of diagnostic errors. Although artificial intelligence (AI) systems have …

papers.title_en: Foundation Model-guided Iteratively Prompting and Pseudo-Labeling for Partially Labeled Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗影像中由于标注成本高和临床需求差异导致的器官标注不全（部分标注）问题，提出了一种由基础模型引导的迭代提示与伪标签生成框架。该方法利用基础模型的强大先验知识，通过迭代过程为未标注器官生成并不断优化伪标签，从而在仅有部分标注的数据集上训练出高性能的分割模型。实验证明，该方法显著提升了多器官分割的准确性，为降低医疗影像标注成本提供了有效的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Automated medical image segmentation has achieved remarkable progress withfully labeled data. However, site-specific clinical priorities and the high cost ofmanual annotation often yield scans with only a subset of organs labeled, leading to …

papers.title_en: Friends and Grandmothers in Silico: Localizing Entity Cells in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了语言模型处理实体相关事实信息的内部机制。通过在多个大语言模型中定位对特定实体具有高度选择性的MLP神经元（即“实体细胞”），研究者揭示了模型如何存储和检索实体知识。该工作不仅识别了这些关键神经元，还分析了它们在推理过程中的作用，为理解模型内部的知识表示提供了重要证据。
papers.abstract_en: Language models can answer many entity-centric factual questions, but it remainsunclear which internal mechanisms are involved in this process. We study thisquestion across multiple language models. We localize entity-selective MLP neurons …
